Daily

Morning Note

Overnight macro, key data and events, rates snapshot, equity setup, and one actionable theme — delivered before the open.

⚡

Weekly

Trade Idea

A long or short across equities or fixed income with a full thesis, entry/exit framework, catalyst table, and bull/base/bear scenarios.

Deep-Dive Note

A comprehensive single-name or sector analysis — financials, valuation, competitive dynamics, and a clear investment conclusion.

About

Who We Are

Convex Research Group is an independent research firm publishing equity and fixed income analysis for investors who think asymmetrically.

We produce daily morning notes, weekly trade ideas, and deep-dive sector research — covering equities and rates with a focus on rigorous, independent analysis untethered from institutional consensus.

Founded by a student of markets and economics, Convex Research Group exists because the best research starts with intellectual independence, not a house view.
